scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/studio && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/scraper && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/docs
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/backend" "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/frontend" "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/scraper"
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/backend && npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/frontend && npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/scraper
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:run
